current_positions.statement: Pickup and dropoff logistics should use a written schedule with defined windows rather than informal last-minute calls.

proposals.statement: Both parents are conditionally open to a default-guideline logistics coordination package covering pickup windows, activity hand-off, and holiday sequencing.
